title: helichrysum persicum
intro: Helichrysum persicum, also known as Persian tarragon or Persian curcuma, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Persia and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum persicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as essential oil, tea, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
